source_pr.title: realtikvtest: dedicated package for real tikv tests

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select a, b from normal_table order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "100 102")) (session/session_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select a, b from normal_table order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "100 102")) (session/session_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The tests were flaky because they did not reliably clean up tables/views created during the test run, leaving residual state that could interfere with subsequent tests. This PR stabilizes the suite by adding a teardown cleanup that enumerates tables via `SHOW FULL TABLES` and drops views/tables before closing the domain/store.
fix_pattern: Add a teardown cleanup that drops all tables/views (via `SHOW FULL TABLES`) before `dom.Close()`/store close to prevent cross-test state pollution.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select a, b from normal_table order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "100 102")) (session/session_test.go)
